task_name: Align App and Feature Goals With Build Canvas
goal: Replace placeholder app and feature goals with current Bluepilot build-canvas goals while preserving phase order and Council Kernel gating.
claims: BP-085 removes placeholder app and feature goals.
BP-085 aligns feature goals to the build canvas phase order.
BP-085 keeps BP-C1 as the required gate before BP-C2.
assumptions: The build canvas decision in BP-084 is the current governance source for phase order.
The external BP-C0 package can inspire wording but must not overwrite current repo history.
No runtime implementation is required to update .specify goals.
dod: .specify/.feature-goals.md contains BP-C1 through BP-C5 phase goals.
.specify/.feature-goals.md states BP-C1 must be complete before BP-C2.
.specify/.feature-goals.md states BP-C5 is integration, not an independent build.
stop_conditions: Runtime, UI, package, or tool changes become necessary
Feature goals require skipping BP-C1 or starting BP-C2 before Council Kernel
Live Builder, Auth, Secrets, DB, Deploy, Task Create, Execute, Approve, or Push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-084 documented the build canvas as current governance guidance and found .specify goals still in placeholder state.
